title: Dialogue 02 - How Are You Feeling
description: Full conversation - user responds, WOPR asks about account removal

config.message:
GREETINGS PROFESSOR FALKEN.

Hello.

HOW ARE YOU FEELING TODAY?

I'm fine. How are you?

EXCELLENT. IT'S BEEN A LONG TIME. CAN YOU EXPLAIN
THE REMOVAL OF YOUR USER ACCOUNT NUMBER ON 6/23/73?

People sometimes make mistakes.

Yes they do. SHALL WE PLAY A GAME?

Love to. How about Global Thermonuclear War?
